revision.comment: sort key
revision.text:
{{DisestablishmentsInCenturyBC|4|5th|6th|4th}}
The 5th century BC is the time period from the year [[500 BC]] to [[401 BC]].
''See also:'' [[:Category:5th-century BC establishments|5th-century BC establishments]]
[[Category:1st-millennium BC disestablishments|-5]] [[Category:5th century BC|Disestablishments]] [[Category:Disestablishments by century|-95]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
revision.text:
{{DisestablishmentsInCenturyBC|4|5th|6th|4th}}
